meaning: n.[化]拒食素(一种能使食植物的昆虫产生拒食现象的化学物质)
examples: Results indicated a strong antifeedant activity.
The fact that children from poor families rarely have the antifeedant and choosy food.
The method for synthesizing the compounds is simple and suitable for industrial production; and the compounds have obvious activity of insect antifeedant.
